text.title: Voice UI Basics Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Voice UI Basics.

example.scenario: Solo founder ships an Alexa skill for a small bank. 14 intents (balance / send / statement / cards / PIN / etc.). All prompts ≤12 words. Error matrix covers no-input (5s reprompt), no-match (clarification), fallback (transfer to human). Destructive intents (cancel-transfer) confirmed via yes/no. Real-device test on Echo Dot.
example.trace: r1-closed-intent-set → r2-prompts-under-15-words → r3-error-matrix-three-cases → r4-confirmation-on-destructive-intents → r5-test-with-real-voice → spec stored
